title: F-007 删除死依赖 picocolors
description: picocolors is already a dead dependency in packages/cli — there are 0 real imports (verified: the only mention in src is a comment in colors.ts; the only declaration is the dependency line in package.json). Remove the dependency line from packages/cli/package.json and delete the stale 'picocolors' word from the colors.ts comment so knip --strict reports no unused/undeclared dependency.
action: Delete the line `"picocolors": "^1.1.1",` from the dependencies block of packages/cli/package.json. In packages/cli/src/colors.ts, remove the stale reference to picocolors in the ux-w2-5 comment (the phrase 'private picocolors palette') so no 'picocolors' token remains in src/. Run pnpm install to refresh the lockfile, then knip.

criteria: pnpm lint (knip --strict) exits 0 with no picocolors finding
convergence.verification: grep -rn picocolors packages/cli/package.json packages/cli/src; pnpm install; pnpm lint
convergence.definition_of_done: picocolors is fully removed from the CLI package manifest and source; knip is clean.

files.change: Drop the stale 'private picocolors palette' phrasing so no picocolors token remains in src.

implementation: Edit package.json: remove the picocolors dependency line (mind trailing comma on the preceding/following line).
Edit colors.ts: reword the comment to drop 'picocolors'.
Run pnpm install to update the lockfile (drops the unused package).
Run pnpm lint (knip --strict) and tsc --noEmit to confirm clean.

success_metrics: no picocolors token anywhere in cli package

reference.pattern: dead-dep removal verified by knip --strict + grep census across manifest + src

rationale.chosen_approach: Trivial one-line manifest delete + comment cleanup. Kept as its own tiny wave-1 task so it lands independently of the F-001 primitive work and the lockfile change is isolated in one commit.

risks: Removing the wrong comma in package.json breaks JSON — verify with a parse (node -e require).
